name: Gujo Hachiman
description: Known as the Water City, Gujo Hachiman is a pristine riverside town in Gifu. Famous for its summer Gujo Odori dance festival lasting 32 nights, beautiful canals, and being the birthplace of Japanese plastic food replicas.
reservation: Book hotels well in advance during summer
parking: Public parking available outside town center

itineraries.name: Waterways and Culture
itineraries.description: Discover pristine canals and local crafts.

steps.activity: Visit the Sogi-sui Water Source and walk along the crystal-clear canals.
Try your hand at making wax food replicas at Sample Village Iwasaki.
Lunch: Local Soba noodles using Gujo's pure water.
Hike up to Gujo Hachiman Castle for panoramic valley views.
Relax at a riverside cafe before heading back.

notes: Famous for its pristine waterways, the town feels incredibly refreshing in summer.
